overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character in a studded leather jacket walking through wet London streets at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and observes urban traffic while streetlights and neon signs illuminate the scene.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a dark coat who moves ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the ego character along the same sidewalk path

entered.detail: multi-story apartment blocks with illuminated windows lining the street
row of parked vehicles along the curb including sedans and vans
low concrete wall and metal railings separating sidewalk from road
tall lampposts casting yellow-white light onto the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential city sidewalk at night, following a pedestrian ahead. Streetlights illuminate the wet pavement while parked cars line the left side and a low barrier separates the walkway from the road.

events.description: passing a large illuminated digital billboard displaying CRISPR advertisement on the right
motorcycle with rider passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past commercial signage and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: motorcycle traveling along the road passing the ego character's position

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying red CRISPR advertisement text
illuminated poster display with 'Report it before it's too late' messaging
glass and metal transit shelter with internal lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more commercial area with bright digital billboards and advertising kiosks. A motorcycle passes on the road while the character walks past a bus shelter and illuminated posters on the wet reflective pavement.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the street at crosswalk
character stops at the opposite corner to wait for passing traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk then waiting at the corner observing traffic flow

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
illuminated signal posts at the intersection corners
yellow and black striped posts marking the corner boundary
multi-story commercial building with ground floor storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection using the crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians. After crossing, the character waits at the corner near traffic bollards while observing moderate vehicle traffic flowing through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with passing traffic

events.description: character resumes walking along the street corner after waiting for vehicles to pass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street edge observing the urban environment and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: blue circular traffic signs mounted on black and yellow posts
illuminated buildings and streetlights visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the street corner, passing directional traffic signs and observing the flow of vehicles. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the character moves toward the distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet London cityscape that transitions from a quiet residential sidewalk into a vibrant, commercial urban hub. It begins by trailing a pedestrian along a dimly lit walkway lined with parked cars and streetlights reflecting off the damp pavement. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts into a bright commercial district filled with glowing digital billboards, advertising kiosks, and the blur of a passing motorcycle. The scene then expands as the character navigates a wide, busy intersection among other pedestrians before pausing at the corner near traffic bollards to observe the flow of vehicles. Finally, the camera follows the character past directional traffic signs and oncoming pedestrians, moving deeper into the city toward the distant glow of urban lights.
